title: Summer Launch Party Avery+AmyTangerine!
excerpt: Woohoo! It's officially summertime! It’s incredible to think that we’re already halfway through 2018. If you haven’t already, it’s time to start making your mark! That’s exactly what I tried to do with my brand new capsule collection with the…
body:
Woohoo! It's officially summertime! It’s incredible to think that we’re already halfway through 2018. If you haven’t already, it’s time to start making your mark! That’s exactly what I tried to do with my brand new capsule collection with the classic Avery brand. The collection includes binders, folders and page dividers.

Folks came out in full-force to celebrate the amazing products on Tuesday in a festive, fabulous, and balloon-filled launch party. The event was attended by over 70 supportive, lovely people. The party also got a shout-out in the Hollywood Reporter!

I can’t tell you how encouraging it is to be affirmed by this incredible community of art-lovers, appreciators, and creators. The event was even covered in a fabulous article by MomAngeles.

A calligrapher attended and customized these incredible tote bags for everyone who came. It was amazing to see another creative woman at work in her own bright, colorful way!

As you can see, people were happy, colorfully dressed and excited to get their hands on the new merchandise! I felt so lucky to have a supportive and positive crowd of amazing, lovely ladies around me! Some of them even brought their little ones  to join in on the fun!

To me, the products embody creativity, positivity and optimism. I want you to feel happy when using one of my binders or inspired to complete whatever tasks they have ahead of them! The designs also go along perfectly with my book's cover art. 

If you're anxious to get your hands on something from my collection (or maybe all of it!!), I've posted the links down below. All of it is Prime eligible on Amazon so you could have it in your hands just two days from now!! Isn't that amazing?

·         Avery® + Amy Tangerine® Designer Collection Durable View Fashion Binder retail for $7.99

·         Avery® + Amy Tangerine® Designer Collection Big Tab™ Fashion Dividers retail for $4.49

·         Avery® + Amy Tangerine® Designer Collection 6 pack Folders retail for $9.99

Overall, the party was tons of fun! It was so satisfying to celebrate something I worked hard to create and see it bring joy to others in a real, tangible way.

What are most excited to try from the collection? How are you planning to make your mark this summer? Be sure to let me know in the comments below! xoxo!
